mode_of_action_summary: Combination of chlorothalonil and cymoxanil provides dual protection against fungal diseases. Chlorothalonil acts as a contact fungicide preventing spore germination, while cymoxanil provides curative action by penetrating plant tissues and stopping fungal development inside the plant.

active_ingredients.name: Chlorothalonil
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Multi-site contact activity inhibiting fungal enzyme systems

active_ingredients.name: Cymoxanil
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Locally systemic activity disrupting fungal growth inside plant tissues

pest_behavior.spore_germination: Fungal spores germinate on leaf surface causing infection
pest_behavior.rapid_spread: Diseases spread quickly in humid conditions
pest_behavior.tissue_infection: Fungi penetrate plant tissue leading to lesions and rot

urdu: پتوں پر دھبے آ رہے ہیں
بیماری تیزی سے پھیل رہی ہے
punjabi: پتے تے داغ آ رہے نیں
roman_urdu: pattay par daagh aa rahe hain
bimari tezi se phail rahi hai

application_details.method: Uniform foliar spray ensuring full leaf coverage
application_details.coverage: Ensure both upper and lower leaf surface coverage

resistance_management.advice: Rotate with fungicides of different FRAC groups

safety: Do not spray in strong wind
benefits: Controls a wide range of fungal diseases
farmer_benefits: بیماری جلدی کنٹرول ہو جاندی اے

multilingual_description.english: Dual action fungicide for effective control of blight and fungal diseases.
multilingual_description.urdu: ڈبل ایکشن فنگس کش دوا جو بیماریوں کو مؤثر طریقے سے کنٹرول کرتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: ڈبل ایکشن فنگس کش جو بیماری نوں مؤثر طریقے نال ختم کردا اے۔

embedding_text: Cortex 36 fungicide contains chlorothalonil and cymoxanil and is used for control of blight downy mildew and fungal diseases in vegetables and crops. It provides both protective and curative action.
